output.summary: Applied two CSS-only changes for equal-height cards and image hover zoom effect

filesModified.purpose: Remove self-start from swiper-slide to enable equal-height cards via Swiper's default stretch behavior
changes: Line 150: Changed class from 'swiper-slide self-start h-auto!' to 'swiper-slide h-auto!' - removing 'self-start' allows Swiper flexbox layout to stretch all slides to match the tallest slide's height

filesModified.purpose: Add image hover zoom effect scoped to dynamic-content-carousel cards
changes: Added CSS rules following Archive block pattern (scale 1.05, 0.3s ease transition)
Scoped to .dynamic-content-carousel to avoid affecting other carousels
Applied to card-post and card-team-member (the only card types with images)
Leverages existing overflow-hidden containers on both card templates

warnings: Pre-existing webpack size warnings (not related to changes)
Pre-existing ESLint warnings in other blocks (no changes to TSX files)

syncStatus.notes: TSX file uses FilteredServerSideRender for carousel section, so no TSX sync needed. All changes are in PHP template and CSS only.

testPage.notes: Test page already exists from initial build. Changes are pure CSS/layout fixes that work on existing test content.

fixesApplied.implementation: Removed 'self-start' from swiper-slide class. Cards already have h-full and flex-col with mt-auto on CTA, so content alignment is preserved while all cards now stretch to match tallest card height.
fixesApplied.verification: Follows same pattern as TestimonialsCarousel (line 101: 'swiper-slide h-auto!' without self-start)

fixesApplied.description: Image zoom-in hover effect at scale(1.05)
fixesApplied.implementation: Added CSS rules in swiper.css following Archive block pattern (Archive.css lines 133-142). Applied to .dynamic-content-carousel .card-post img and .card-team-member img with 0.3s ease transition. Both card templates already have overflow:hidden containers (card-post line 23, card-team-member line 22).
fixesApplied.verification: Exact same scale and timing as Archive block. Scoped to dynamic-content-carousel to prevent conflicts.

implementationNotes.equalHeightMechanism: The height chain for equal-height cards: swiper-slide (h-auto! + stretch) -> card wrapper div (h-full on anchor) -> article (h-full + flex-col) -> mt-auto on CTA pushes it to bottom. All four card types already have this chain.
implementationNotes.imageHoverScope: Only card-post and card-team-member have images. card-resource and card-policy are text-only, so no hover rules needed.
implementationNotes.existingOverflow: card-post has 'div.overflow-hidden.rounded-xl' at line 23. card-team-member has 'div.overflow-hidden.rounded-xl' at line 22-23. Both clip overflow so scaled images stay within bounds.
implementationNotes.noAttributeChanges: Both changes are pure CSS/class modifications. No block.json changes needed.
implementationNotes.patternConsistency: Follows existing theme patterns: Archive block for hover zoom, TestimonialsCarousel for equal-height slides.
